name: Metamorphosis
short_description: An interactive visual novel in the mystical genre. Mikey is admitted to an unusual institution for treatment, where he encounters supernatural phenomena and begins to prepare for a metamorphosis that will lead him into another world.
detailed_description:
Discover the story of Mikey, a teenager who is institutionalized by his mother for psychotherapy group treatment. Haunted by tragedy, Mikey has never been able to come to terms with his fate. Abandoned by everyone, he encounters unexplained events and supernatural phenomena, uncovering the secrets of the asylum and its residents—just as lonely and forgotten as he is.

The principal and the psychotherapist speak of rebirth, draw him into the mysterious World of the Red Sun, and remain silent about the missing children... and Mikey discovers new abilities and begins to change....

It's up to you to decide which path the hero will take.

One will lead him to the fulfillment of his dreams.

Another will destroy the lives of everyone he holds dear

The third will change the world forever... Or annihilate it.

🩸A dynamic, interactive storyline from the very first scene. A dark, mystical atmosphere where your choices truly matter

🩸A light narrative tone with dark jokes and black humor—serious themes without overwhelming heaviness

🩸Lively animations and musical accompaniment for total immersion

🩸The story has multiple branching paths and 13 endings

🩸A secret scene after completing all endings

🩸Quick-time events

🩸Screamers

🩸A script over 45,000 words long. The walkthrough takes an average of 3-4 hours to complete.
